description: Legal document in Hebrew, probably. Only the lower section with a partial witness signature (?___יעקב מ) is visible along with a note that may relate to the missing text. The note states that __ Kohen has control over the earnings from a specific residence. 15th- to 17th-century based on the paleography.
description_he: מסמך משפטי בעברית. מוחזק בספריית קיימברידג'.
